name: fluentpath-english
description: Prototype for an English learning app with an AI coach, courses, pronunciation practice, and lesson recording.

scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check server.js && node --check src/security.js && node --check src/storage/index.js && node --check src/storage/memory.js && node --check src/storage/postgres.js && node --check src/server/auth.js && node --check src/server/cookies.js && node --check src/server/http.js && node --check src/server/static.js && node --check src/server/validators.js && node --check src/server/routes/account.js && node --check src/server/routes/admin.js && node --check src/server/routes/auth.js && node --check src/server/routes/index.js && node --check src/server/routes/pronunciation.js && node --check src/server/routes/teacher.js && node --check scripts/migrate.js && node --check scripts/seed.js
